title: Create: Redstone Link GUI
description: Set redstone link frequencies via JEI.
body:
![Redstone Link GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d37852fc8d8c9161bba949cfa56267b2d070708_0.webp)
# Overview

This mod is made to address one gripe I've alway had with create mod: Needing to have items on hand to set redstone link frequencies is just too inconvenient. The release of Aeronautics exacerbated this problem with how much redstone link usage it demands, motivating me to make this mod.

## How it works:

Shift right click(can be configured) a redstone link or any other similar block's frequency slots with empty hand to opens a GUI where you can set frequencies using JEI/EMI.

Enables relocating redstone link blocks using a similar system as moving factory gauges.

Should work with all blocks using redstone link frequencies.
